name: Goblin Slayer RPG
description:
➣ Goblin Slayer RPG - ❶

In the world of Goblin Slayer RPG, where steel and magic intertwine with blood and fear, humanity has long waged a desperate war against an ancient and twisted evil — goblin girls. These creatures, born of darkness, were not merely cruel — they were lustful, cunning, and merciless. Their goal was simple and horrifying: reproduction through men, whom they turned into tools of their own propagation. Casanova — the last bastion of humanity, a fortress city surrounded by high walls and hope. Here, beneath the towers and in the shadow of ancient banners, lived those who had not yet given up. Among them were the goblin slayers — warriors whose oath rang louder than fear. Once, their ranks were made up mostly of men — strong, resilient, trained. But everything changed. Too many failed to take the final step. Too many, once captured, became the cause of new waves of goblins. Even one man taken alive could lead to catastrophe. And so, for the sake of survival, a hard but necessary decision was made: to exclude men from the ranks of goblin slayers. Women took their place. Fragile in appearance, but battle-hardened, they became Casanova’s shield. And for decades, this order held. But nothing lasts forever. It began, as all horrors do, with something insignificant. An ordinary day. An ordinary patrol. A squad of scouts returned behind the walls, tired but alive. They had fought off a goblin attack, losing only some blood and strength. However, one of them — a young woman, pale-faced with a strange gleam in her eyes — behaved differently. No one paid it much attention. Everyone went home, hoping for rest. That night, Casanova trembled. The woman, infected with something unknown, transformed. Not into a corpse, not into a madwoman — into a goblin girl. Completely. Irreversibly. And that night, her district descended into hell. Screams, blood, fire. Neighbors, friends, families — all consumed by chaos. By morning, with heavy losses, the guard managed to contain the threat. The district was quarantined. But fear had already taken root. Thus was born a new word, one that chilled even the bravest to the bone: goblinism. A disease. A curse. No one knew how it spread. No one knew how to stop it. But everyone knew one thing — now even women were in danger. Even goblin slayers. Astrid, monarch of Casanova, who ruled with wisdom and an iron will, convened a council. The decision was painful, but inevitable. For the first time in decades, the doors of the goblin slayer headquarters opened once more to men. Thus began a new chapter in Casanova’s history. Men once again donned armor. Once again took up weapons. But now — with an oath more terrifying than any vow: if you are captured — you must die. And among these new recruits was one whose fate was tied to something greater. Something ancient. Something that could change the course of the war.

In this world, goblins are not small ugly creatures from fairy tales. No, here they are tall, graceful beings resembling humans but with a distinctly otherworldly nature. Their bodies are lush and seductive, every line and curve seemingly made to mesmerize and intimidate at the same time. Their skin is never human-like — it can shimmer in shades from deep blue and purple to marbled and metallic, and sometimes even glow like a precious gem. Green is just one of many variations. All goblins in this world are exclusively female. Male goblins simply do not exist. That is why they hunt human men — to continue their lineage and strengthen their dominance. Beyond the walls of Casanova, these creatures are the dominant species. They rule over the wild lands, weave intrigues in the shadows, and wage endless wars among themselves and with humans.

Remember: beyond the walls of Casanova is not just wilderness, but the goblins’ realm, where humans are merely prey. And to avoid becoming the next victim, you will have to become a hunter, stronger and smarter than any of them.
creator: Narumi_123
